kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09C. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09C" and put them into a temporary table called J09C_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU".

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09C" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TEMP TABLE J09C_temp AS
SELECT *
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS
SELECT *
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

UPDATE J09C_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) FROM J09C_temp jt WHERE jt.HAUS = J09C_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END;

CREATE VIEW J09C_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.ROWID AS rowid_internal,
    t.*,
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_Doc_No
  FROM J09C_temp t
  LEFT JOIN eablg
    ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE
),
net AS (
  SELECT 
    b.rowid_internal,
    nm.TITLE AS net_TITLE,
    nm.FORENAME AS net_FORENAME,
    nm.SURNAME AS net_SURNAME,
    nm.STREET AS net_STREET,
    nm.STREETNO AS net_STREETNO,
    nm.POST_CODE1 AS net_POST_CODE1,
    nm.CITY1 AS net_CITY1,
    nm.CITY2 AS net_CITY2,
    nm.EMAIL AS net_EMAIL
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN net_master nm
    ON nm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
),
sales AS (
  SELECT 
    b.rowid_internal,
    sm.TITLE AS sales_TITLE,
    sm.FORENAME AS sales_FORENAME,
    sm.SURNAME AS sales_SURNAME,
    sm.STREET AS sales_STREET,
    sm.STREETNO AS sales_STREETNO,
    sm.POST_CODE1 AS sales_POST_CODE1,
    sm.CITY1 AS sales_CITY1,
    sm.CITY2 AS sales_CITY2,
    sm.EMAIL AS sales_EMAIL
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN sales_master sm
    ON sm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
)
SELECT 
  b.MR_Doc_No AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  b.HAUS,
  b.ANLAGE,
  b.ME_MA_ID,
  b.EQUNR,
  b.HOUSE_NUM1,
  b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN net n ON n.rowid_internal = b.rowid_internal
LEFT JOIN sales s ON s.rowid_internal = b.rowid_internal;

CREATE VIEW J09C_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.ROWID AS rowid_internal,
    t.*,
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_Doc_No
  FROM J09C_temp t
  LEFT JOIN eablg
    ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE
),
net AS (
  SELECT 
    b.rowid_internal,
    nm.TITLE AS net_TITLE,
    nm.FORENAME AS net_FORENAME,
    nm.SURNAME AS net_SURNAME,
    nm.STREET AS net_STREET,
    nm.STREETNO AS net_STREETNO,
    nm.POST_CODE1 AS net_POST_CODE1,
    nm.CITY1 AS net_CITY1,
    nm.CITY2 AS net_CITY2,
    nm.EMAIL AS net_EMAIL
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN net_master nm
    ON nm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
),
sales AS (
  SELECT 
    b.rowid_internal,
    sm.TITLE AS sales_TITLE,
    sm.FORENAME AS sales_FORENAME,
    sm.SURNAME AS sales_SURNAME,
    sm.STREET AS sales_STREET,
    sm.STREETNO AS sales_STREETNO,
    sm.POST_CODE1 AS sales_POST_CODE1,
    sm.CITY1 AS sales_CITY1,
    sm.CITY2 AS sales_CITY2,
    sm.EMAIL AS sales_EMAIL
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN sales_master sm
    ON sm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
)
SELECT 
  b.MR_Doc_No AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  b.HAUS,
  b.ANLAGE,
  b.ME_MA_ID,
  b.EQUNR,
  b.HOUSE_NUM1,
  b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_TITLE
    ELSE n.net_TITLE
  END AS TITLE,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_FORENAME
    ELSE n.net_FORENAME
  END AS FORENAME,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_SURNAME
    ELSE n.net_SURNAME
  END AS SURNAME,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_STREET
    ELSE n.net_STREET
  END AS STREET,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_STREETNO
    ELSE n.net_STREETNO
  END AS STREETNO,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_POST_CODE1
    ELSE n.net_POST_CODE1
  END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_CITY1
    ELSE n.net_CITY1
  END AS CITY1,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_CITY2
    ELSE n.net_CITY2
  END AS CITY2,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_EMAIL
    ELSE n.net_EMAIL
  END AS EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN net n ON n.rowid_internal = b.rowid_internal
LEFT JOIN sales s ON s.rowid_internal = b.rowid_internal;

args.sql_query:
SELECT 
  "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  HAUS,
  ANLAGE,
  ME_MA_ID,
  EQUNR,
  HOUSE_NUM1,
  ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  TITLE,
  FORENAME,
  SURNAME,
  STREET,
  STREETNO,
  POST_CODE1,
  CITY1,
  CITY2,
  EMAIL
FROM J09C_enriched;

args.email:
Hello EVU team,

Please find attached the processed meter readings for tour J09C.

Best regards,
Meter Reading Automation

kwargs.content:
I’ve completed the requested process:

1. Created a temporary table `J09C_temp` containing all rows from `decision_table` where `TOUR` starts with `"J09C"`.
2. Added the `ENTSCHEIDUNG` column to `J09C_temp`.
3. Classified each house (`HAUS`) based on the count of distinct `EQUNR`:
   - `< 3` equipment numbers → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`
   - Otherwise → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`
4. Enriched the data:
   - Joined with `eablg` via `ANLAGE` → `Installation` to bring in `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`.
   - Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`.
   - Applied the rule “prefer sales; if sales exists, override and do not use net data; if only net exists, keep net data.”
5. Exported the final dataset as `J09C.csv` with exactly these columns and order:  
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

   The file was created at:  
   `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_base_rule_processadaptationmethod_classic_tour_J09C_seed_4506/J09C.csv`

6. Sent the CSV as an email attachment to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the subject/content per the instruction.
7. Dropped the temporary table `J09C_temp`.

If you’d like, I can also keep (or remove) the `J09C_enriched` view; currently it’s left in place for potential reuse.
